_comment: Faithful model of Rhino CloudGoat 'iam_privesc_by_attachment'. The IAM user kerrigan holds iam:AttachUserPolicy, a Rhino privesc primitive: it lets the user attach AdministratorAccess to itself. The iam collector draws kerrigan --CAN_ESCALATE_TO--> account-admin. There is NO network in this scenario (no cloudnet-sample.json): the attacker starts from kerrigan's leaked credentials, so the path forms only under the credential-origin lens (SEED_IAM_USERS). This is the exact mismatch the M1 real-AWS run surfaced.
